title: Incident Event
description: Canonical schema for incident lifecycle events used to compute Time to Restore and track incident severity.

event_type.description: Discriminant for event routing. Must be 'incident'.

incident_id.description: Unique identifier for the incident (e.g., PagerDuty or incident-management system ID).

service.description: Service or component affected by the incident.

occurred_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the incident was opened or resolved.

linked_deployment_sha.description: Commit SHA of the deployment that triggered or resolved the incident, if known.
